title: Decision: Check SigningBackendRegistration first in from_uri to provide 'signing-only' error
description: In from_uri (lines 92–106), the dispatch checks BackendRegistration first (matching read-only backends), then SigningBackendRegistration. When a backend is found only in SigningBackendRegistration, from_uri returns InvalidUri with the message '...is a signing-only backend; use secretx::from_signing_uri instead'. This provides actionable guidance to callers attempting to use signing backends with the wrong API — they learn exactly which backend they matched and which function they should use instead. Without this check, callers would see only 'unknown or disabled backend', which is less helpful. The alternative of returning the error from the signing backend's factory itself would obscure the intent by mixing backend-specific construction errors with dispatch errors.
